title: Review of the Senior Traffic Commissioner’s Statutory Document: Vocational Driver Conduct
body: "The statutory guidance on vocational driver conduct has been reviewed and revised. The Senior Traffic Commissioners is now seeking views on the proposed revisions.  The document sets out the standards for professional lorry, bus and coach drivers and applicants. It also explains how traffic commissioners and staff delegated to act on their behalf propose to deal with driver conduct cases. "

taxons.title: Professional driving of lorries, buses and coaches
Road safety, driving rules and penalties
